Consent Statement: By clicking ÒI agreeÓ, you confirm that: You are at least 18 years old You have read and understood the information above You voluntarily agree to participate in this study. Do you agree to participate in this study?

Before image generators (like DALLE (OpenAI), Midjourney, Nano Banana etc.) were available, how did you express or visualize a mental image to communicate it to others or clarify it for yourself? Examples of such situations could include: (1) describing a scene from a story, dream, or memory to someone else; (2) explaining a design idea to a colleague or client (e.g., how a poster, logo, room, or interface should look); or (3) planning and imagining a space (e.g., rearranging furniture, designing a room, or envisioning a building or landscape). - Selected Choice

Before image generators (like DALLE (OpenAI), Midjourney, Nano Banana etc.) were available, how did you express or visualize a mental image to communicate it to others or clarify it for yourself?
